def write_csv_report(data, filepath):
    with open(filepath, "w") as f:
        f.write("id,name,value\n")
        for row in data:
            f.write(f"{row['id']},{row['name']},{row['value']}\n")

def generate_config(pairs, filepath):
    with open(filepath, "w") as f:
        for key, value in pairs:
            f.write(f"{key}={value}\n")
